log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician activates Gem Flight! (2 uses remaining)
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 20] FAIL! 33 necrotic damage. HP: 34/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---

→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:14+12=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 6 fire damage. Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 28/67
=== ROUND 4 ===

=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---

→ Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician activates Gem Flight! (1 uses remaining)

→ Concentration save: [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
